name: Wildcards
author: wetcircuit
description: Generate a batch of images using inline wildcards to randomize elements within the prompt.

name: Detailer
author: ClarkCheekyKent
description: Generates many images and zooms in to detail the faces on each image.

name: Single Detailer
author: ClarkCheekyKent
description: Zooms in to detail faces on current image on the canvas.

name: Creative Upscale
author: Liu Liu
description: Generate up to 4x upscaled image from the input with crisp details.

name: SD Ultimate Upscale
author: Gongster
description: Generate high-quality, high-resolution images from low-resolution inputs, while preserving fine details and textures.
